source_pr.title: test: bump failpoint
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
fix unit test deadlock by update newest failpoint 


### What is changed and how it works?
the newest failpoint fix a bug that lead to unit test deadlock. see https://github.com/pingcap/failpoint/pull/49.


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test
 - Integration test
 - Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
 - No code

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to environment/external dependencies (resource contention, ports, or real cluster timing). This PR stabilizes it by: test: bump failpoint.

evidence: evidence: PR body: "fix unit test deadlock" by updating to newest failpoint; references pingcap/failpoint#49.
evidence: diff bumps github.com/pingcap/failpoint version in go.mod/go.sum.
